description: Auditor binding spec for the agritech soil-sensor yield-score re-derivation (Axis-2 spec-pinned dispatch). The representative re-derived output is the scalar yield_score, computed from inputs/sensor_stream.json (48 hourly readings) and payload/fusion_weights.json as round(w_soil_moisture*mean(soil_moisture_pct) + w_soil_temp*mean(soil_temp_c) + w_npk*mean(npk_ppm) + w_rainfall*sum(rainfall_mm) + bias, 6). The linear-weighted fusion aggregation rule lives in the verifier primitive (agritech_sensor_recompute); the comparator and tolerance are pinned HERE by the auditor (scalar_epsilon, epsilon=1e-5), not producer-asserted. A producer who ships a weaker spec gets a SHA the anchor does not list, so dispatch fails closed.
